name: Kinaxis RapidResponse Supply Chain Planning API
what_it_does: Kinaxis RapidResponse REST API for concurrent supply chain planning platform. Enables AI agents to manage demand planning and forecasting workflows, handle sales and operations planning (S&OP) processes, access inventory optimization and multi-echelon modeling, retrieve supply chain scenario analysis and what-if simulations, manage capacity planning and constraint analysis, handle order promising and available-to-promise (ATP), access supply chain risk and disruption analysis, retrieve KPI dashboards and planning analytics, manage exception management and alert workflows, and integrate planning data with ERP, MES, and demand sensing systems.
use_cases: Managing demand planning and S&OP workflows from supply chain planning agents
Accessing scenario analysis and what-if simulations from supply chain intelligence agents
Retrieving inventory optimization data from replenishment planning agents
Integrating planning data with ERP and demand sensing from enterprise supply chain agents
not_for: Operational execution without supply chain planning complexity
Small businesses without multi-echelon supply chain planning needs
Simple demand forecasting without concurrent supply and capacity planning
best_when: An enterprise using Kinaxis RapidResponse wants AI agents to automate demand planning, S&OP workflows, scenario analysis, inventory optimization, exception management, and ERP integration.
avoid_when: OPERATIONAL RISK: RapidResponse drives enterprise-wide supply chain decisions — automated plan changes affect production schedules, inventory positions, and supplier commitments. Scenario analysis and plan publishing must be reviewed before execution. Demand forecast errors propagate through entire supply chain.

auth.notes: Kinaxis uses OAuth 2.0 and API keys for RapidResponse REST API. Environment-level credentials with planning, data, and analytics scopes. Developer documentation portal. Webhooks for exception and alert events. Strong S&OP and concurrent planning architecture.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise planning subscription required
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-planner and data volume subscription; enterprise pricing
pricing.notes: Ottawa, Canada. TSX: KXS. Founded 1984. Market leader for concurrent supply chain planning. $400M+ annual revenue. Used by Honda, Merck, Unilever, and 200+ enterprises. RapidResponse concurrent planning differentiator. Acquired Rubikloud (ML demand sensing) 2020. Competes with Blue Yonder and o9 Solutions for supply chain planning.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per environment; planning data volume throttling

known_agent_gotchas: OPERATIONAL RISK: Plan changes affect production schedules and supplier commitments — automated publishing requires approval workflow
Concurrent planning model — simultaneous API access may conflict with planner scenarios; workspace management required
No public MCP server — REST API with developer documentation portal
Planning data volumes can be very large — bulk data export requires async patterns
S&OP cycle timing — automated data pushes must align with planning cycle cadence
RapidResponse workbook and worksheet model — understanding data architecture is prerequisite for API automation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Supply chain planning and forecast data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU/CA data residency. Confidential planning and supplier data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Supply chain planning data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU/CA data residency. Planning and forecast confidentiality.
